item.description: After strikes resumed between the U.S. and Iran, Sen. Roger Marshall (R-Kan.) tells Meet the Press he doesn’t believe the conflict is “over” as the Trump administration claims but believes the "major" part of the war is finished.

media:content.media:title: GOP Sen. Marshall says additional U.S. strikes in Iran just ‘mop-up operation’: Full interview
media:content.media:description: After strikes resumed between the U.S. and Iran, Sen. Roger Marshall (R-Kan.) tells Meet the Press he doesn’t believe the conflict is “over” as the Trump administration claims but believes the "major" part of the war is finished.

item.title: GOP Sen. Marshall says additional U.S. strikes in Iran just ‘mop-up operation’: Full interview

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
Rudy Chinchilla
item.description: When Guillermo Ochoa stepped onto the pitch in the 78th minute of Mexico’s match with Czechia on Wednesday night, the stadium let out a roar that seemed to reverberate across the country and beyond.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa #13 of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory against Czechia in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Czechia v Mexico: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory against Czechia in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa #13 of Mexico during the Czechia v Mexico match.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory against Czechia in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa, Goalkeeper for Mexico.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory against Czechia in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa, Goalkeeper for Mexico.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory against Czechia in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa, Goalkeeper for Mexico reacts during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match between Czechia and Mexico.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory against Czechia in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match Wednesday in Mexico City.

item.title: Goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa’s emotional World Cup farewell leaves lasting legacy for Mexico fans

item.description: El astro rosarino recibió una falta fuera del área, él mismo cobró el tiro libre y encontró el espacio entre la barrera para colar un fino zurdazo casi al centro del arco sin que el arquero jordano pudiera reaccionar, sumando su sexto gol en esta Copa.

media:content.media:title: ¡Golazo de Messi! El 10 firma otra genialidad de tiro libre con Argentina y suma seis en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El astro rosarino recibió una falta fuera del área, él mismo cobró el tiro libre y encontró el espacio entre la barrera para colar un fino zurdazo casi al centro del arco sin que el arquero jordano pudiera reaccionar, sumando su sexto gol en esta Copa.

item.title: ¡Golazo de Messi! El 10 firma otra genialidad de tiro libre con Argentina y suma seis en el Mundial

item.description: Tras varios toques de balón entre los experimentados Modric y Kovačić, el último lo pasa al centro de la cancha donde Petar Sučić tira desde fuera del área y encaja el primero de Croacia al poste de la portería ghanesa.

media:content.media:title: Petar Sucic abre el marcador para Croacia con un riflazo fuera del área
media:content.media:description: Tras varios toques de balón entre los experimentados Modric y Kovačić, el último lo pasa al centro de la cancha donde Petar Sučić tira desde fuera del área y encaja el primero de Croacia al poste de la portería ghanesa.

item.title: Petar Sucic abre el marcador para Croacia con un riflazo fuera del área

item.description: Giovani Lo Celso, Nico Paz y Lionel Scaloni se mostraron satisfechos con el triunfo y el desempeño de todo el equipo ante Jordania. // Categories: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026

media:content.media:title: Los seleccionados argentinos jubilosos con la oportunidad y así lo expresan
media:content.media:description: Giovani Lo Celso, Nico Paz y Lionel Scaloni se mostraron satisfechos con el triunfo y el desempeño de todo el equipo ante Jordania. // Categories: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026

item.title: Los seleccionados argentinos jubilosos con la oportunidad y así lo expresan

item.description: Argentina terminó como líder de su grupo con otra actuación destacada de Lionel Messi. Inglaterra, Croacia, Colombia y Portugal también aseguraron su lugar en la siguiente ronda

media:content.media:title: Messi y Argentina avanzan; Inglaterra cierra como líder
media:content.media:description: Argentina terminó como líder de su grupo con otra actuación destacada de Lionel Messi. Inglaterra, Croacia, Colombia y Portugal también aseguraron su lugar en la siguiente ronda

item.title: Messi y Argentina avanzan; Inglaterra cierra como líder

item.description: La pasión del Mundial se vivió dentro y fuera de los estadios. Miles de aficionados celebraron la clasificación de sus selecciones, mientras otros disfrutaron una fiesta de banderas, cánticos y emociones en la última fecha de la fase de grupos.

media:content.media:title: La pasión no se detiene: así se vive el Mundial dentro y fuera de los estadios
media:content.media:description: La pasión del Mundial se vivió dentro y fuera de los estadios. Miles de aficionados celebraron la clasificación de sus selecciones, mientras otros disfrutaron una fiesta de banderas, cánticos y emociones en la última fecha de la fase de grupos.

item.title: La pasión no se detiene: así se vive el Mundial dentro y fuera de los estadios

item.description: Nuestros expertos analizan los últimos partidos de fase de grupos de la Copa del Mundo, destacando las carencias de Panamá, la buena presentación de Colombia ante Portugal, y el excelente rendimiento de Argentina previo a las rondas de eliminación.

media:content.media:title: Colombia cierra la fase de grupos en su mejor forma y Argentina avanza firme
media:content.media:description: Nuestros expertos analizan los últimos partidos de fase de grupos de la Copa del Mundo, destacando las carencias de Panamá, la buena presentación de Colombia ante Portugal, y el excelente rendimiento de Argentina previo a las rondas de eliminación.

item.title: Colombia cierra la fase de grupos en su mejor forma y Argentina avanza firme

item.description: Colombianos y portugueses ofrecieron uno de los mejores partidos y donde solamente faltó el gol, mientras que Messi volvió a marcar.

media:content.media:title: El partidazo entre Colombia y Portugal, además del triunfo de Argentina es lo Mejor del Día
media:content.media:description: Colombianos y portugueses ofrecieron uno de los mejores partidos y donde solamente faltó el gol, mientras que Messi volvió a marcar.

item.title: El partidazo entre Colombia y Portugal, además del triunfo de Argentina es lo Mejor del Día

item.description: Giovani Lo Celso afirmó que su debut mundialista fue mucho más de lo que imaginaba y agradeció al cuerpo técnico y a su familia. El volante destacó el puntaje ideal de Argentina, el gran clima del grupo y la motivación que contagia Messi.

media:content.media:title: Lo Celso: “Esperé mucho este momento de debutar en un Mundial”
media:content.media:description: Giovani Lo Celso afirmó que su debut mundialista fue mucho más de lo que imaginaba y agradeció al cuerpo técnico y a su familia. El volante destacó el puntaje ideal de Argentina, el gran clima del grupo y la motivación que contagia Messi.

item.title: Lo Celso: “Esperé mucho este momento de debutar en un Mundial”

item.description: Nico Paz valoró el respaldo que reciben los jóvenes dentro de la selección y aseguró que la unión del grupo se refleja en la cancha. El mediocampista agradeció el cariño de la afición y sabe que la instancia que viene es muy distinta a la fase de grupos.

media:content.media:title: Nico Paz: “Los grandes nos dan consejos y confianza para jugar”
media:content.media:description: Nico Paz valoró el respaldo que reciben los jóvenes dentro de la selección y aseguró que la unión del grupo se refleja en la cancha. El mediocampista agradeció el cariño de la afición y sabe que la instancia que viene es muy distinta a la fase de grupos.

item.title: Nico Paz: “Los grandes nos dan consejos y confianza para jugar”

item.description: En un partido que fue intenso de inicio a fin, Argelia y Austria terminaron 3-3, con goles de sus respectivas figuras y un resultado que acabó beneficiando a ambos países, consiguiendo su boleto para la siguiente ronda de la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Argelia y Austria empatan en un partidazo y los dos celebran su clasificación a 16vos
media:content.media:description: En un partido que fue intenso de inicio a fin, Argelia y Austria terminaron 3-3, con goles de sus respectivas figuras y un resultado que acabó beneficiando a ambos países, consiguiendo su boleto para la siguiente ronda de la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Argelia y Austria empatan en un partidazo y los dos celebran su clasificación a 16vos

item.description: El capitán entró de cambio y aun así anotó para sumar su sexto gol en la Copa y sellar la goleada ante Jordania, con lo que la Albiceleste se reafirmó como líder del Grupo J con tres victorias y ahora enfrentará a Cabo Verde en la siguiente ronda.

media:content.media:title: Tres triunfos, paso perfecto y Messi en modo campeón: Argentina líder rumbo a 16avos del Mundial
media:content.media:description: El capitán entró de cambio y aun así anotó para sumar su sexto gol en la Copa y sellar la goleada ante Jordania, con lo que la Albiceleste se reafirmó como líder del Grupo J con tres victorias y ahora enfrentará a Cabo Verde en la siguiente ronda.

item.title: Tres triunfos, paso perfecto y Messi en modo campeón: Argentina líder rumbo a 16avos del Mundial

item.description: The death toll is still rising in Venezuela with search and rescue crews working around the clock in a race against time. More than 1,400 people have been killed since Wednesday’s back-to-back earthquakes near the country’s capital and families are reporting nearly 70,000 others are missing.

media:content.media:title: Nearly 70,000 Still Reported Missing After Venezuela Earthquakes
media:content.media:description: The death toll is still rising in Venezuela with search and rescue crews working around the clock in a race against time. More than 1,400 people have been killed since Wednesday’s back-to-back earthquakes near the country’s capital and families are reporting nearly 70,000 others are missing.

item.title: Nearly 70,000 Still Reported Missing After Venezuela Earthquakes

item.dc:creator: Bridget Bowman
item.description: Rep. Julia Letlow won the Republican primary runoff for Senate in Louisiana, NBC News projects, defeating state Treasurer John Fleming in another victory for President Donald Trump’s slate of preferred candidates

media:content.media:text: Letlow Goes To Louisiana Republican Senate Runoff
media:content.media:description: Representative Julia Letlow, a Republican from Louisiana and US Senate candidate, during a news conference at in Metairie, Louisiana, US, on Monday, May 18, 2026.

item.title: Trump-backed Rep. Julia Letlow wins Louisiana Senate primary runoff

item.dc:creator: Bracey Harris
item.description: Before the outcry, before the demands for justice, before he was placed inside a small casket with a stuffed Bluey, a family had looked forward to sharing simple moments with Kohen Wiley, who was just months away from his second birthday and named by his maternal grandma.

media:content.media:text: A memorial with balloons and stuffed animals in front of a Walmart.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A memorial with stuffed animals in front of a Walmart.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A triptych image from a funeral in Mississippi.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A group of people standing in the shade of tall trees in front of a brick building.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A man, seen from the neck down, with his arms around his two sons.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A steel water tower appears behind a highway road sign at dusk.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Warm light falls across an asphalt parking lot at sunset.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

item.title: Family of 1-year-old boy fatally shot by Mississippi police say goodbye, as questions remain

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 may be over, but some of the deals aren’t. Here are the best sales still live, including Medicube, Oura Ring, Apple and more editor favorites.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is over, but I found 131+ deals still available — shop before you miss them

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: Sen. Roger Marshall, R-Kan., on Sunday said that the war between the U.S. and Iran has moved into a stage he called, “a mop-up operation,” hours after the U.S. launched fresh strikes on Iran.“The major war is over, and think of this as almost just a mop up operation,” Marshall told NBC News’ “Meet the Press.”

media:content.media:text: Senator Roger Marshall Meets With HHS Secretary Kennedy And Agriculture Secretary Rollins
media:content.media:description: U.S. Sen. Roger Marshall, R-Kan speaks during a roundtable discussion on soil health in the Mike Mansfield Room at the U.S. Capitol on July 15, 2025 in Washington, DC.

item.title: Sen. Roger Marshall says U.S. strikes on Iran are a ‘mop-up operation’

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
Rudy Chinchilla
item.description: When Guillermo Ochoa stepped onto the pitch in the 78th minute of Mexico’s match with Czechia on Wednesday night, the stadium let out a roar that seemed to reverberate across the country and beyond.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa #13 of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory against Czechia in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Czechia v Mexico: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory against Czechia in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa #13 of Mexico during the Czechia v Mexico match.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory against Czechia in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa, Goalkeeper for Mexico reacts during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match between Czechia and Mexico.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory against Czechia in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match Wednesday in Mexico City.

item.title: Goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa’s emotional World Cup farewell leaves lasting legacy for Mexico fans

item.dc:creator: Lindsey Leake
item.description: The shingles vaccine may significantly help protect older adults against dementia, a growing body of evidence shows

media:content.media:text: Woman with shingles

item.title: More evidence shows shingles vaccine protects against dementia. What’s really going on?

item.dc:creator: Freddie Clayton
item.description: President Donald Trump has warned that the United States could be forced to return to war as a series of escalating reciprocal strikes with Iran continued into Sunday, threatening to unravel peace efforts between the two countries

media:content.media:text: OMAN-IRAN-US-ISRAEL-WAR
media:content.media:description: This aerial photograph shows boats anchored off Oman's northern Musandam Peninsula near the Strait of Hormuz on June 27.

item.title: Iran strikes Kuwait and Bahrain as escalating attacks threaten to unravel peace efforts

item.dc:creator: Bracey Harris
item.description: Before the outcry, before the demands for justice, before he was placed inside a small casket with a stuffed Bluey, a family had looked forward to sharing simple moments with Kohen Wiley, who was just months away from his second birthday and named by his maternal grandma.

media:content.media:text: A memorial with balloons and stuffed animals in front of a Walmart.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A memorial with stuffed animals in front of a Walmart.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

item.dc:creator: Bridget Bowman
item.description: Rep. Julia Letlow won the Republican primary runoff for Senate in Louisiana, NBC News projects, defeating state Treasurer John Fleming in another victory for President Donald Trump’s slate of preferred candidates

media:content.media:text: Letlow Goes To Louisiana Republican Senate Runoff
media:content.media:description: Representative Julia Letlow, a Republican from Louisiana and US Senate candidate, during a news conference at in Metairie, Louisiana, US, on Monday, May 18, 2026.

item.title: Trump-backed Rep. Julia Letlow wins Louisiana Senate primary runoff

item.dc:creator: Aria Bendix
Samantha Cookinham
item.description: At least three people have died in flash floods caused by heavy rain and multiple thunderstorms in Kentucky, officials said, a severe weather event that prompted Gov.

media:content.media:text: A line of vehicles driving through floodwater.
media:content.media:description: Drivers maneuver their vehicles through high water flooding West Parrish Avenue after a heavy rainfallin Owensboro, Ky. on June 27, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Submerged cars at an intersection with red lights.
media:content.media:description: Street flooding in Richmond, Ky. on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Andy Beshear speaking in front of an array of microphones.
media:content.media:description: Gov. Andy Beshear warned Kentucky residents in a video message not to drive after dark, adding that a motorist was swept away and killed by the floods.

item.title: Kentucky flash floods kill at least 3 people with rescue operations ongoing
